work_order_events_cancelled_voided_needs.name: work_order_events_cancelled_voided_needs_reason
work_order_events_cancelled_voided_needs.value: "work_order_events"."to_state" NOT IN ('cancelled', 'voided') OR ("work_order_events"."reason" IS NOT NULL AND length(btrim("work_order_events"."reason")) > 0)
